diagram_title: Managed MCP App Market And Google Calendar — IDEF0

activities.title: Govern Managed App Registry
activities.description: Maintain the built-in managed app catalog as the single authority for metadata, install lifecycle, and operator-visible availability.

activities.title: Install And Configure Managed App
activities.description: Materialize install/config/enable state, bind required config, and publish Web/TUI-visible lifecycle transitions without external MCP wiring.

activities.title: Authorize Google Calendar Binding
activities.description: Acquire and bind Google Calendar OAuth identity strictly through canonical auth/account authority.

activities.title: Execute Calendar Intent
activities.description: Route natural-language calendar requests through the managed app tool surface and fail fast on install/auth/config/runtime violations.
